sections.paragraph:
ἐλευϑερία, ας, ἡ [s. next entry] ‘absence of constraint relating to personal choice or action’, freedom, liberty

—a. liberation from Mosaic legal constraint Gal 2:4; 5:1, 13; in related vein 1 Cor 10:29; 2 Cor 3:17; Js 1:25; 2:12.

—b. freedom of God’s people in general 1 Pt 2:16.

—c. illegitimate understanding of freedom as license 2 Pt 2:19.
